seoTitle: Mayfield East vs Mayfield North — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mayfield East and Mayfield North. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mayfield East vs Mayfield North: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mayfield East and Mayfield North.
heading: Mayfield East vs Mayfield North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mayfield East, New South Wales and Mayfield North, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mayfield East has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Mayfield North (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mayfield East or Mayfield North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mayfield East has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Mayfield North scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mayfield East scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Mayfield North scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mayfield East or Mayfield North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mayfield East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
